ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for the employment data */,
  "area_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code identifying the area */,
  "area_title" TEXT /* Title of the area (e.g., state or region) */,
  "industry_group" TEXT /* Group of industries being reported */,
  "annual_avg_emplvl" INTEGER /* Average employment level in the industry */,
  "total_annual_wages" REAL /* Total annual wages for the industry */,
  "avg_annual_pay" REAL /* Average annual pay for the industry */,
  "quarterly_data" TEXT /* JSON column to store quarterly employment and wage data */,
  "employment_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of employment growth compared to the previous year */,
  "wage_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of wage growth compared to the previous year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the industry */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate for the industry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., BLS, state labor department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "area_fips", "industry_group")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code identifying the area */,
  "area_title" TEXT /* Title of the area (e.g., state or region) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State to which the area belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., state, county, metropolitan area) */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* JSON column to store latitude and longitude */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the area data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_groups" (
  "industry_group" TEXT /* Identifier for the industry group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry group */,
  "parent_industry" TEXT /* Parent industry group (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Standard industry code (e.g., NAICS code) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry group data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_group")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year (e.g., Pre-recession, Post-recession) */,
  "economic_context" TEXT /* JSON column to store economic context data (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_statistics" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the wage statistics */,
  "area_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code identifying the area */,
  "total_annual_wages" REAL /* Total annual wages for the area */,
  "avg_annual_pay" REAL /* Average annual pay for the area */,
  "total_employment" INTEGER /* Total employment in the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate in the area */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., BLS, state labor department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "area_fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store user permissions */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
